encoded_truth: Search contribution follows a Hill-like curve with diminishing marginal returns.
expected_demo_reveal: Do not broadly cut Search; target spend above the saturation region.

encoded_truth: Social is materially stronger for Career_Changer than Degree_Seeker.
expected_demo_reveal: Allocate Social selectively by audience rather than uniformly.

encoded_truth: Enrollment loss accelerates when processing delay exceeds 36 hours.
expected_demo_reveal: Operational throughput is the highest-impact intervention.

encoded_truth: Performance declines once creative age exceeds roughly 6 weeks.
expected_demo_reveal: Refresh aging creative before blaming channel quality.

encoded_truth: Competitor promotions reduce enrollments in selected region-weeks.
expected_demo_reveal: Separate competitor pressure from internal marketing performance.

encoded_truth: Regions differ in demand baseline and operational capacity.
expected_demo_reveal: Avoid treating all regions as exchangeable.
